data.content: Implemented alias-aware beat labels across the missed views. RelationshipPicker now fetches selected beat details so selected dependency badges use aliases when present, /api/waves now formats blocked readiness reasons from aliases and passes aliases through to the wave planner, and focused alias tests were added. Validation completed in the implementation worktree: bun run lint (repo has existing warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
